raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker_box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The darker box (leftmost) has free space to its left and right faces, no object is immediately adjacent; the cup in front of the lighter box does not block lateral access to the darker box. Both arms can reach the mid-height of the box sides without colliding with the tabletop.",
    "Postcondition": "Both arms securely press against the opposite lateral faces of the darker box, lift it a few centimeters, and the box is now held stably above the tabletop by the robot."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The darker box (leftmost) has free space to its left and right faces, no object is immediately adjacent; the cup in front of the lighter box does not block lateral access to the darker box. Both arms can reach the mid-height of the box sides without colliding with the tabletop.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both arms securely press against the opposite lateral faces of the darker box, lift it a few centimeters, and the box is now held stably above the tabletop by the robot.
